name: Akito Yamada
description: Yamada is a high school student who is an intellectual and a good looking guy. He is not interested in romance but in playing games. He is a famous pro-gamer and receives money from sponsors. He mainly plays FPS (First Person Shooter) games. He is a player of the game Forest Of Savior (FOS) and a part of a guild named [Chocolate Rabbit]. His character's name is Yamada and his character's role is a Wizard.
